---
title: "Resume"
format: html
---

::: {.resume-page}

::: {.resume-meta-row}
<div class="resume-last-updated">
  <div class="resume-label">LAST UPDATED</div>
  <div class="resume-date">April 2026</div>
</div>

<div class="resume-download-wrap">
  <a class="resume-download-btn" href="files/resume.pdf" target="_blank">Download Resume</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.resume-pdf-wrap}
<iframe src="files/resume.pdf"></iframe>
:::

:::
